CONTENT.Career: Kerk began his football career in his hometown club, TSG Bad Wurzach, where he played until 2005. He moved to FV Ravensburg, where he spent three years. In 2008, he joined the youth setup of SC Freiburg.He made his first team debut for SC Freiburg on 18 May 2013 against Schalke 04.On 31 August 2016, Kerk joined 1. FC Kaiserslautern on a season-long loan.Kerk joined 1. FC Nürnberg in June 2017, reportedly signing a three-year contract.After spells with VfL Osnabrück and Hannover 96, on 23 August 2023 Kerk moved abroad for the first time in his career and signed a two-year contract with Polish Ekstraklasa club Widzew Łódź.
CONTENT.External links: Sebastian Kerk at WorldFootball.netSebastian Kerk at fussballdaten.de (in German)

SUMMARY: Sebastian Kerk (born 17 April 1994) is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Polish club Widzew Łódź.
